name: languages
description: RStack languages plugin pack — combines: ARM Cortex-M firmware development for Teensy, STM32, nRF52, and SAMD with peripheral drivers and memory safety patterns | Comprehensive .NET backend development with C#, ASP.NET Core, Entity Framework Core, and Dapper for production-grade applications | Functional programming with Elixir, OTP patterns, Phoenix framework, and distributed systems | JavaScript and TypeScript development with ES6+, Node.js, React, and modern web frameworks | Modern Julia development with Julia 1.10+, package management, scientific computing, high-performance numerical code, and production best practices | JVM language development including Java, Scala, and C# with enterprise patterns and frameworks | Modern Python development with Python 3.12+, Django, FastAPI, async patterns, and production best practices | Production-grade Bash scripting with defensive programming, POSIX compliance, and comprehensive testing | Systems programming with Rust, Go, C, and C++ for performance-critical and low-level development | Web scripting with PHP and Ruby for web applications, CMS development, and backend services
